meta_title: For Freelancers: SEO for SaaS to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SEO for SaaS: A Freelancer’s Guide to Growth | AI Builder
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about marketing. Use this beginner-friendly SEO checklist for SaaS to automate traffic and client acquisition with Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to scale. By leveraging Antigravity for automated content infrastructure and Claude Code for technical SEO implementation, you turn your SaaS into an organic growth engine. This workflow automates keyword research, metadata injection, and site architecture, allowing you to ship features while your SEO builds itself.
content.intro:
You’ve built a powerful SaaS tool, but the silence is deafening. You’re a developer, not a growth hacker, and the prospect of 'marketing' feels like a distraction from the code you love. The truth is, marketing isn't about being a salesperson; it's about engineering a system that lets your product be found.

We’re going to swap the hustle for a pipeline. By treating SEO as a technical challenge rather than a creative one, we can automate the discovery phase. Using Antigravity to structure your data and Claude Code to execute the technical deployment, you’ll transform your application into a magnet for high-intent traffic without ever writing a generic blog post.

steps.title: Automated Keyword Architecture
steps.description: Identify high-intent, low-difficulty keywords that solve your users' specific pain points to create a robust site map.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my SaaS product niche and generate a list of 20 high-intent, long-tail keywords. Structure these into a content silo hierarchy that maps to my core product features.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate site_map.json based on the keyword silo hierarchy provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Programmatic Metadata Injection
steps.description: Ensure every page has optimized meta tags by automating the generation process based on your route structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a template for dynamic SEO meta tags (title, description, open-graph) that injects keywords based on the page route and component props.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file ./src/components/SEO.tsx --prompt 'Implement the dynamic meta-tag injection template provided by Antigravity into this component.'

steps.title: Schema Markup Automation
steps.description: Inject JSON-LD structured data to help search engines understand your SaaS functionality and improve rich snippet eligibility.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON-LD schema markup script for a SaaS product page, including 'SoftwareApplication' type, pricing, and aggregate rating placeholders.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file ./public/index.html --add-schema 'Inject the generated JSON-LD script into the document head.'

steps.title: Technical SEO Audit
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan for common technical bottlenecks like broken links, slow load times, or missing alt tags.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a checklist of technical SEO audit points for a React-based SaaS. Focus on core web vitals and crawlability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude audit --path ./src --rules 'Check for missing image alt tags, lighthouse performance bottlenecks, and broken internal links.'

steps.title: Automated Sitemap Generation
steps.description: Create a dynamic sitemap that updates whenever you ship new product features, ensuring Google indexes your work instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that scans the project routes and generates an XML sitemap, prioritizing the most important functional pages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create a node script that generates a sitemap.xml file on every build trigger.'

pro_tips: Use programmatic SEO to create landing pages for every long-tail keyword variation you identified.
Never hardcode titles; always use data-driven templates that pull from your database entities.
Focus on 'Problem-Solution' keywords rather than 'Feature' keywords to capture high-intent traffic.
Use Claude Code to automate the addition of internal links between related blog posts and feature pages.
Monitor your Google Search Console click-through rate; if it's low, use Antigravity to iterate on your meta descriptions.
content.next_steps: Once your SEO infrastructure is live, deploy your sitemap to Google Search Console and monitor your 'Impressions' growth over the next 30 days. Use the data to refine your keywords.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to scale without the marketing headache. Stop waiting for traffic and start engineering it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
